channel.title: Posts on w6rst
channel.description: Recent content in Posts on w6rst

item.title: Cutter Installation
item.description: Cutter is an advanced, user-friendly reverse engineering platform powered by Rizin. If you’re looking to install Cutter on your Linux system, follow these simple steps.

item.title: Kali Installation
item.description: Kali Linux is an open-source distribution designed for cybersecurity professionals, ethical hackers, and penetration testers. It is Debian-derived and focused on providing over 600 tools for penetration testing and security auditing.
